question:
Anne is big. Anne is red. Fiona is big. Fiona is not round. Fiona is smart. Gary is furry. Gary is smart. If Anne is big and Anne is furry then Anne is blue. If someone is white then they are round. If Anne is blue then Anne is white. All red, big people are white. All white people are furry. If someone is furry then they are smart. If Gary is blue and Gary is not big then Gary is smart. Question: Gary is not smart.
